name: Basic Bar Package (25 Guests)
description: This package is for parties up to 25 guests and includes: +1 hourn for prep, 1 Bartender, liquor, and chasers for basic cocktails such as cognac and coke, vodka cran, screwdriver, etc. Chasers: Juices, Sodas, Water. Liquors: Vodka, Tequila, Hennessy (Cognac). Includes setup (1 hr), service (4 hrs), and breakdown (30 min). Service time begins after setup is complete. Cleanup overage: $100/hr beyond the included 30 minutes. Travel: 25 miles round-trip included. Long-distance travel fee may apply. Client keeps all opened/unopened items. Basic package focuses on simple drinks (ex: Paloma, Vodka Cran, Henny & Coke) using the included mixers.
